description: The marketing team wants a visual 'Shop by Category' section on the homepage. Add an Image field named 'Category Image' (machine name: field_category_image) to the existing 'Product Categories' vocabulary and upload the provided images from /home/ga/Downloads/category_images/ to the 'Headphones', 'Keyboards', and 'Monitors' terms. Create a View named 'Category Grid' that displays these terms as a grid of images and names, and place this View as a block in the 'Content' region of the homepage.
